title: Saro´s Parkour Blocks
description: Adds blocks with abilities To Create a Parkour
body:
# ⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTICE ⚠️

This project is no longer being updated or maintained. 

A completely remastered version with improved features, better performance, and ongoing support is now available! 

👉 Check out "Saro's Parkour Blocks Remastered" for the latest version: [[https://modrinth.com/project/saros-parkour-blocks-remastered](https://modrinth.com/project/saros-parkour-blocks-remastered)]

Thank you to everyone who supported this original version!


![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70c00aaae29c0e4eacff89592279739bfe64fab4.png)

This mod adds certain parkour blocks to Minecraft

 
CurseForge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saro-s-parkour-blocks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saro-s-parkour-blocks)
 

For example: Jump Blocks, Speed Blocks, Moving Blocks, and More

 

 

Survival compatible
Multiplayer compatible

 

Supportet Versions:

1.20.1
1.20.1 (Fabric/Quilt)
1.19.4
1.19.2 (Fabric/Quilt)
1.19.2
1.18.2
1.16.5
1.15.2
 

For block wishes please contact us

 

 
**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.


 

 

Discord https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe
[![https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Die_Minewache/BH_MD_promo.webp "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php ")](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php")
